text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's bright and early on the day of the Arima
Kinen, and Oguri Cap asks me to meet for a chat.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Mmm... Isn't this spot just so relaxing?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're in one of her favorite places—the forest
behind the academy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Last night, I was thinking back on all the
memories we've made till now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The day we met, all the training sessions we've
had together...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her voice, though seemingly calm, sounds rife
with various emotions...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
At first, I was just doing this for the sake of
everyone back home. I wanted to live up to their
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But then I met all the different people I'd be
competing against, and I realized that victory was
something I wanted for myself too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I wanna win and make everyone happy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I wanna make all my fans glad that they chose to
support me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's why I wanna win now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her fans' encouragement is what brought Oguri
Cap this far. Today, at the legendary Arima
Kinen, she's going to show everyone what dreams
are made of.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I came here to win, so let's make a promise.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm not going to let anyone else beat me. I
want you to focus all your hopes on me!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks. I've got this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We can hear the crowd cheering. People are
calling out to Tamamo Cross, Super Creek, and
the other big names.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But that's not all.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Oguri! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Oguriiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're also yelling for Oguri Cap, the beast from
the boonies.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Call my name as loud as you can, everyone! The
louder your voices, the faster I'll run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins the Arima Kinen, the race to end
all races.
